title: 「So + adjective + that」句型
titleEn: Using So + adjective + that to express degree and result

source.file: Sentence Structure 73 -「So + adjective + that」表達程度及結果.pdf

formula: Subject + be / linking verb + so + adjective + that + result clause

formulas.formula: Subject + be / linking verb + so + adjective + that + result clause

example: Sometimes life could be so hard that we want to give up.
exampleZh: 有時人生可以艱難到讓我們想放棄。

examples.en: Sometimes life could be so hard that we want to give up.
examples.zh: 有時人生可以艱難到讓我們想放棄。

examples.en: Dad was so angry that he broke his phone.
examples.zh: 爸爸氣得把手機也摔壞了。

meaning.zh: So + adjective + that 把強烈程度和該程度帶來的結果連接起來。

rules.zh: 在 so 和 that 之間放形容詞。
rules.en: Put an adjective between so and that.

rules.zh: 形容詞說明某種狀態的強烈程度，而 that 後面的子句則說明該程度所帶來的結果。
rules.en: The adjective describes a strong degree, and the that-clause shows the result caused by that degree.
The tense may change according to the situation.

rules.zh: 不要把 so + adjective + that 與 such + noun + that 混淆。
rules.en: Do not confuse so + adjective + that with such + noun + that.

rules.zh: 「So + adjective + that」表達程度及結果；表示目的的「so that」意思相當於「為了／好讓」。
rules.en: So + adjective + that expresses degree and result; the purpose structure so that means in order that.

benefits.zh: 它不只表示某事「非常」，還會用一個結果說明程度有多強。
benefits.en: It makes the degree clear by giving a result.

benefits.zh: 它能把描述寫得更具體，說明強烈狀態帶來了甚麼結果。
它能把描述和結果合併成一句，避免寫出多句零散的短句。
benefits.en: It joins a description and a result in one sentence.

benefits.zh: 它能自然地說明因果關係。
benefits.en: It helps you explain cause and effect naturally.

benefits.zh: 除了反覆使用 very、because、therefore 或分開寫兩句之外，還可用這個句型表達相同關係。
benefits.en: It gives you another useful sentence pattern instead of repeatedly using very, because or therefore.

en: Rewrite each sentence using so + adjective + that to show degree and result.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 so + 形容詞 + that 改寫以下句子，以表達程度及結果。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: The box was too heavy for Ben to lift.
questions.promptZh: 這個箱子太重，本無法把它提起。
questions.answer: The box was so heavy that Ben could not lift it.
questions.answerZh: 這個箱子太重，以致本無法把它提起。
questions.highlight: The box was so heavy that Ben could not lift it.

questions.prompt: Mia was extremely tired, so she fell asleep on the sofa.
questions.promptZh: 米婭非常疲倦，所以在梳化上睡着了。
questions.answer: Mia was so tired that she fell asleep on the sofa.
questions.answerZh: 米婭累得在梳化上睡着了。
questions.highlight: Mia was so tired that she fell asleep on the sofa.

questions.prompt: I was extremely hungry. As a result, I ate two sandwiches.
questions.promptZh: 我非常肚餓。因此，我吃了兩份三文治。
questions.answer: I was so hungry that I ate two sandwiches.
questions.answerZh: 我餓得吃了兩份三文治。
questions.highlight: I was so hungry that I ate two sandwiches.

questions.prompt: Our classroom was very noisy, so the teacher stopped speaking.
questions.promptZh: 我們的課室非常嘈吵，所以老師停止說話。

questions.answerZh: 我們的課室太嘈吵，以致老師停止說話。

questions.prompt: Our dog was extremely frightened, so it hid under the bed.

questions.prompt: These instructions were very clear, so everyone understood them.

questions.prompt: It was such a funny film that we laughed from beginning to end.
questions.promptZh: 這部電影非常搞笑，令我們由頭笑到尾。
questions.answer: The film was so funny that we laughed from beginning to end.

questions.prompt: My bag was too full for me to close.

questions.answer: Sarah was so cold that she wore two coats.

questions.prompt: It was such an easy question that every student answered it correctly.
